Phase 2
Registration Now Live!

Polymer is Ethereum’s Interoperability Hub, connecting Ethereum Layer 2’s using the Inter-Blockchain Communication Protocol.

Polymer Labs is excited to announce that our Polyverse Registration is now live.

Register your wallet by connecting your wallet. Upon connecting and verifying your wallet, your participation will be registered. You are now ready to participate in Polyverse Phase 2 and earn your Web3 rewards.

REGISTER NOW

PARTNERS THAT TRUST US

FROM THE POLYMER BLOG

News
4 Min.
read

Polymer Labs Raises $23M to Build Ethereum’s Interoperability Hub

Polymer Labs raises $23M in Series A funding to build Ethereum's Interoperability Hub.
January 23, 2024
Blog
7 Min
read

Polymer x EigenDA: Open, Neutral Interoperability for Ethereum

Polymer partners with EigenLayer to achieve interoperability and scalability for Ethereum and its Layer 2 chains.
January 17, 2024
Blog
5 Min.
read

Polymer’s Multi-Hop IBC Spec Merges into IBC Repository

Polymer announces multi-hop IBC specification is now merged into the IBC repository.
January 9, 2024
